profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.language_help: Used for the interface and any emails we send you.
profile.disable_password_reset_help: When checked, the "forgot password" flow won't send a reset link to this address. Useful if you sign in with a passkey or SSO and want to make sure the password is the only path in.

auth.name: Name
auth.passkey_cancelled: Passkey prompt was cancelled or timed out.
auth.passkey_failed: Could not sign in with passkey.
auth.confirm_password_help: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
auth.forgot_password_help: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.two_factor_code_help: Please confirm access using the authentication code from your authenticator app.
auth.two_factor_recovery_help: Please confirm access using one of your emergency recovery codes.
auth.verify_email_body: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
auth.verify_email_sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
auth.register_terms: I accept the terms of service

password.title: Password
password.help: Make sure your account uses a long, random password to stay secure.

two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.intro: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a one-time code from your authenticator app on every login.
two_factor.scan_help: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the generated code below to confirm.
two_factor.secret_help: If you cannot scan the code, enter this secret manually:
two_factor.recovery_codes_body: Store these recovery codes in a safe place. Each one can be used once to access your account if you lose your authenticator device.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Browsers and devices currently signed in to your account. Sign out anything you don't recognise.
sessions.driver_warning: Session listing requires SESSION_DRIVER=database. Update your .env and run php artisan session:table && php artisan migrate.
sessions.sign_out_others_confirm: Re-enter your password to sign out every browser other than this one.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which reminder emails you'd like to receive.

api_tokens.title: API tokens
api_tokens.subtitle: Personal access tokens grant API access to your account. Give each one a name so you can revoke it later.
api_tokens.name: Token name
api_tokens.name_placeholder: e.g. iCal feed for my phone
api_tokens.name_help: Use a name that identifies where the token will be used — easier to revoke the right one later.
api_tokens.revoke_confirm: Revoke this token? Any client using it will lose access immediately.
api_tokens.copy_help: Copy this token now — you won't see it again.
api_tokens.new_token_intro: Token "{name}" created. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
api_tokens.bearer_help: Use it as a bearer token in the Authorization: Bearer ... header.

image.title: Profile picture
image.drop_or_choose: Drop an image here or choose a file

image_editor.crop_help: Drag to reposition, scroll to zoom. Crop is locked to a square.

deactivate.title: Deactivate account
deactivate.heading: Deactivate
deactivate.body: Deactivating freezes your account. You won't be able to sign in until an admin reactivates you, but your data is kept.
deactivate.also_cancels_subscription: This will also cancel your subscription.
deactivate.last_member_title_one: You're the last active member of {team}.
deactivate.last_member_title_many: You're the last active member of {teams}.
deactivate.last_member_body_one: Deactivating your account would leave that team without any active user. You can still permanently delete your account, which removes the team along with it.
deactivate.last_member_body_many: Deactivating your account would leave those teams without any active user. You can still permanently delete your account, which removes the teams along with it.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.heading: Delete account
delete.body: Deleting your account is permanent. All your data, including any active subscription, will be removed.
delete.still_owner_title: You still own teams with other members:
delete.still_owner_body_one: Transfer ownership of this team to another member before deleting your account.
delete.still_owner_body_many: Transfer ownership of these teams to another member before deleting your account.
delete.also_deleted_title_one: The following team will also be deleted (you're the only active member):
delete.also_deleted_title_many: The following teams will also be deleted (you're the only active member):
delete.also_deleted_body_one: All contacts, contact groups, and other data in this team will be removed along with your account.
delete.also_deleted_body_many: All contacts, contact groups, and other data in these teams will be removed along with your account.

subscription.card_todo: The Stripe Elements payment widget is not wired up yet in the new Vue frontend. Once integrated it will confirm the SetupIntent and POST the payment method token back to the existing endpoint.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.subtitle: Sign in without a password using Touch ID, Windows Hello, a phone, or a hardware key.
passkeys.name_required: Give the passkey a name (e.g. "MacBook Touch ID").
passkeys.already_registered: You've already registered a passkey on this device for this account.
passkeys.cancelled: Passkey prompt was cancelled or timed out.

home.title: Dashboard
home.no_permissions: You don't have any permissions yet. Ask an administrator to grant you access.
home.no_subscription: You do not have an active subscription.
home.no_upcoming: No birthdays in the next 7 days.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.no_events: No upcoming events in this range.
calendar.subscribe_help: Generate a URL you can paste into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar or Outlook to keep contact birthdays and important dates in sync.
calendar.copy_now: Copy this URL now — it won't be shown again. Paste it into your calendar app's "Add by URL" / "Subscribe from URL" option.
calendar.has_token: A calendar sync URL has already been generated. If you've lost it, rotate to generate a fresh one — the old URL will stop working.
calendar.rotate_confirm: You already have a calendar sync URL. Generating a new one will revoke the old one and break any calendars currently subscribed to it.

contact_groups.title: Contact groups
contact_groups.delete_body: This will permanently remove the contact group {name}.

import.title: Import contacts
import.help: Upload an .xlsx or .csv file. Imported rows are attached to the selected group.

export.title: Export contacts
export.help: Downloads active contacts in the selected group as an .xlsx file.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.delete_confirm_body: This will permanently remove the contact and all associated addresses, phone numbers, emails, dates, URLs, notes, calls, and gift ideas.

slideover.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this?
slideover.name: Name
slideover.remove_comment_q: Permanently remove this comment? Replies stay attached to the contact but lose their parent.
